purpose: Introduce or reshape narrative structure—parts/chapters, hubs, loops, gateways, and codeword economy—then ripple changes through prose, hooks, and QA without leaking spoilers to player surfaces.
outcome: A stabilized topology update (in Hot) with section briefs and scene drafts, harvested hooks, and a Gatekeeper preview—ready to feed Lore Deepening and Codex Expansion, then merge to Cold after gatecheck.

steps.name: Topology Draft
steps.description: Map parts/chapters and designate hubs (fan-out), loops (return-with-difference), and gateways (state-gated)

steps.name: Section Briefs
steps.description: For each affected/new section: intent, stakes, choices, expected state effect, references

steps.name: Prose Pass
steps.description: Draft/adjust section text in style; make choices clear and distinct

steps.name: Hook Generation
steps.description: Create narrative/scene/factual hook cards with rationales and uncertainty levels

steps.name: Style Check
steps.description: Sample sections; flag tone drift; propose motif anchors; suggest PN-surface phrasing patterns

steps.name: Feasibility Check
steps.description: Flag canon collisions; suggest where Lore Deepening is needed

steps.name: Preview Gate
steps.description: Run quick pre-gate: Integrity, Reachability, Nonlinearity

steps.name: Triage Hand-off
steps.description: Pass hook set to Hook Harvest loop; schedule Lore Deepening follow-up

inputs: Current Cold snapshot (canon, codex, style guardrails)
Open hooks (if any) relevant to structure

section_briefs_and_drafts.contents: Section briefs and draft prose for changed/new sections

hook_list.contents: Narrative/scene/factual hooks with triage tags candidate

style_addendum.contents: Style addendum (if any) and motif notes

tu_update.contents: All upstream refs and predicted downstream impacts
